params.buyIsV3: True if buyPool is a V3 pool
params.buyPool: Pool address to buy tokenOut (lower price)
params.minProfit: Minimum profit in tokenIn terms (0 = any profit)
params.sellIsV3: True if sellPool is a V3 pool
params.sellPool: Pool address to sell tokenOut (higher price)
params.tokenIn: The token to borrow and end up with profit in

params.flashToken: Token to borrow (start and end of cycle)
params.hops: Array of swap legs — last hop must output flashToken

params.debtAmount: Amount of debt to cover (≤ 50% of total debt, Aave close factor)
params.debtToken: Token the borrower owes (we flash-loan this)
params.minProfit: Minimum acceptable profit in debtToken units (reverts if not met)
params.sellIsCurve: True if sellPool is a Curve/Balancer stable pool
params.sellIsV3: True if sellPool is a UniswapV3-style pool
params.sellPool: DEX pool used to swap received collateral back to debtToken

executeArb(address,uint256,address,addre.notice: Execute arb without flash loan (using contract balance)

executeArbAaveFL(address,uint256,address.notice: 2-hop arb via Aave V3 flash loan (fallback when Balancer lacks the token)

executeArbFlashLoan(address,uint256,addr.notice: Execute arb via Balancer V2 flash loan (0% fee)

executeMultiHopAaveFL(address,uint256,(a.notice: Multi-hop arb via Aave V3 flash loan

executeMultiHopFlashLoan(address,uint256.notice: Execute multi-hop arb via Balancer flash loan

liquidateFlashLoan(address,address,addre.notice: Execute liquidation via Balancer flash loan (0% fee) Flow: flash loan debtToken → liquidate on Aave → receive discounted collateral       → sell collateral on DEX → repay flash loan → keep profit

setApproval(address,address,uint256).notice: Pre-approve tokens for direct transfers (not needed for V3 callbacks)
